creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209260
upnp - 1.10.0

Update to 1.10.0.
Changelog: https://github.com/mrjimenez/pupnp/blob/release-1.10.0/ChangeLog

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.3,12.1}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.

The following ports optionally depend on devel/upnp:
multimedia/vlc
net-p2p/amule
net-p2p/amule-dev

They have all been tested successfully with the proposed patch and the UPNP option enabled through poudriere on {11.3,12.1}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
They do not require PORTREVISION bumps as the UPNP option is disabled by default for all of them.
